VAL-HIGH-006.title: Filters nil sender check
VAL-HIGH-006.evidence: Nil check for ctx.EffectiveSender at lines 315-318 prevents panic on channel messages

VAL-HIGH-007.title: Blacklists button handler nil check
VAL-HIGH-007.evidence: Nil check for query.Message at lines 289-293 before GetChat().Id access

VAL-HIGH-008.title: Reports unchecked DB errors
VAL-HIGH-008.evidence: All DB calls (SetUserReportSettings, SetChatReportStatus, BlockReportUser, UnblockReportUser) have error handling with user-facing messages

VAL-HIGH-009.title: Filters resource leak fix
VAL-HIGH-009.evidence: Goroutine has defer error_handling.RecoverFromPanic() at lines 355-358 for RemoveAllFilters

VAL-HIGH-011.title: Reports nil reply.From check
VAL-HIGH-011.evidence: Comprehensive nil checks for reply.From in report() (lines 52-57), block case, and unblock case

VAL-MED-001.title: Admin cache invalidation timing
VAL-MED-001.evidence: Cache.InvalidateAdminCache() called after error check in both promote() and demote() functions

VAL-MED-002.title: Reports double-answer fix
VAL-MED-002.evidence: markResolvedButtonHandler() returns early when RequireUserAdmin denies permission, avoiding double-answer

VAL-MED-003.title: Reports unbounded regex
VAL-MED-003.evidence: adminMentionRegex pre-compiled as package variable (line 27), used in handler (line 420)

VAL-MED-011.title: Bans kick missing return
VAL-MED-011.evidence: Both kick() and dkick() return after logging BanMember errors (lines 91-96, 36-41)

VAL-LOW-001.title: Pins context creation
VAL-LOW-001.evidence: unpinallCallback() uses original ctx parameter throughout (lines 73-111), no partial context creation

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance section for Go Test Surface
